articles.author: Sam McNeil, Claudia Ciobanu
articles.title: 5 European nations pledge millions to use Ukrainian know-how to make cheap drone defenses - AP News
articles.description: Five big European military powers have launched a joint effort to build cheap drone defenses and autonomous drones, using Ukraine’s battlefield expertise. On Friday, France, Poland, Germany, the UK, and Italy signed an agreement tied to a program known as LEA…
articles.content: WARSAW (AP) Five European nations have announced a new program to produce low-cost air defense systems and autonomous drones using Ukrainian expertise hard-won over the past four years of war against… [+3687 chars]
